entries.name: State root integrity
entries.description: Applying a valid block transition yields a deterministic state root.

entries.name: Transaction ordering determinism
entries.description: Given identical mempool snapshots and rules, ordering is deterministic.

entries.name: Finality liveness bound
entries.description: Under bounded delay and less than one-third Byzantine nodes, finality remains eventual.

entries.name: Batch commit throughput lower bound
entries.description: Batch commit strategy maintains minimum throughput under nominal load.

entries.name: Memory pool compaction efficiency
entries.description: Compaction preserves fairness while reducing memory pressure.
